overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player ascending a wide concrete staircase from a shadowed urban canyon into a bright sunlit elevated plaza. The clip reveals a sprawling futuristic cityscape with distinctive modern architecture, including a colorful tower marked '02' and a parked futuristic van under an overpass.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up a wide concrete staircase flanked by metal railings and concrete walls

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with horizontal treads ascending between walls
metal pipe handrails running along both sides of the staircase
tall concrete retaining walls on both sides of the stairwell
shadowed building structure visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person ascent up a wide concrete staircase enclosed by high concrete walls and metal handrails. The environment is shadowed and cool-toned with no visible sky, creating an enclosed urban canyon atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza at top of stairs

events.description: emerges from shadowed stairwell into bright direct sunlight
turns left to face the open plaza and city view

agents.ego_description: reaching the summit of the stairs and turning left to explore the sunlit plaza area

entered.detail: large building with geometric blue-tinted glass panels and horizontal white stripes
open concrete platform area at the top of the stairs
massive cylindrical concrete column supporting the overhead overpass
elevated roadway or walkway structure casting shadows on the plaza
dark colored futuristic utility vehicle with boxy design parked under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the shadowed stairwell into bright sunlight, revealing a modern glass building ahead. The camera turns left, transitioning from the enclosed stairs to an open urban plaza with concrete flooring, massive structural pillars, and a parked futuristic van under an elevated overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban plaza with panoramic city views

events.description: fully enters open plaza revealing panoramic city skyline and distant towers

agents.ego_description: walking along the plaza while observing the futuristic cityscape and distant landmarks

notable_agents.action: futuristic van remains parked stationary under the overpass structure

entered.detail: tall distinctive tower with green and orange geometric paneling marked with large white 02
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings and skyscrapers in the distance
single palm tree visible on the edge of the plaza near the drop-off
distant view of harbor or waterfront area visible beyond the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sunlit plaza, the camera reveals a sweeping view of Night City featuring the distinctive colorful tower marked '02' and a dense futuristic skyline. The player passes the structural pillar on the right while the parked van falls behind, with the scene opening up to show a distant waterfront district under clear blue skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from a shadowed urban canyon into a bright, expansive futuristic plaza. It begins with a climb up a wide concrete staircase enclosed by high walls and metal handrails, where the atmosphere is cool-toned and oppressive. As the player reaches the top, the camera emerges from the shadows into brilliant sunlight, turning left to reveal an open plaza featuring massive structural pillars and a futuristic van parked beneath an elevated overpass. The scene then opens further as the camera moves past the pillars, shifting from the immediate concrete surroundings to a sweeping panoramic view of the city skyline. Finally, the vista expands to showcase a colorful tower marked 02 and a distant waterfront district under clear blue skies.
